name: Flashcard Hero
short_description: Foreign language vocab builder. Level up your hero and progress through increasingly difficult challenges with innovative flashcard combat! This unique study method is currently available in French, German, Spanish, Italian, Russian, Ukrainian, Japanese, Chinese, Korean, Arabic, and Turkish!
detailed_description:
Tired of boring vocabulary flashcards? Gamify your study routine with innovative flashcard combat and RPG-like gameplay elements in Flashcard Hero!

Progress through twelve cities featuring increasingly difficult enemies (and increasingly advanced vocabulary lists!) in your foreign language of choice: French, German, Spanish, Italian, Russian, Ukrainian, Japanese, Chinese (Simplified), Korean, Arabic, or Turkish.

Customize your playstyle with Hero Stats as you gain levels and experience, earn Steam achievements, and compete with other players on the community leaderboard! 

Need to brush up first with a more traditional flashcard experience? Review vocabulary in a self-paced non-combat environment before taking on your flashcard enemies. Too easy? Try Hardcore Mode for extra intensity (and extra experience!).

-= Patch 1.1 =-

Fixed a word library issue causing game to freeze while playing World 1, Zone 3 on Japanese.

**UPDATE 1.2**

Added native language user interfaces in French, Russian, Spanish, and Chinese!

Now scalable to various screen resolutions.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
